subcodes.first_line: This is a Book unto My people who have believed in My Self, acknowledged My Book, turned unto My Countenance, and confessed that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابی لامتی التی آمنت بنفسی و اعترفت بکتابی و توجهت الی وجهی و اقرت بما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
